positive: A minimalist, symmetrical geometric arrangement featuring stylized woodland creatures: a howling wolf, a majestic owl, a leaping fox, and a leaping deer, rendered in clean black line art against a pale beige or cream background. The style is inspired by Art Deco linework and zentangle patterns, with strong, negative space contrast and crisp, solid black silhouettes. The composition is perfectly centered and balanced, ideal for chest printing. Use delicate cross-hatching and pointillism for texture, and ensure all elements have clean, uninterrupted edges. High resolution, vector art quality, suitable for apparel print, clean symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, low detail, messy, noisy, watermark, text, logo, trademark, color bleed, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, grimy, jpeg artifacts
